svg.font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans, Segoe UI, sans-serif
svg.title: Sovereign Conclave Advanced Blueprint
svg.desc: A highly detailed, futuristic HUD visualization of the Sovereign Conclave deliberation protocol.

g.title: Georgy Zhukov - decisive force, initiative, operational reach
George Washington - strategic endurance, preserve force and legitimacy
John J. Pershing - logistics, training, unity of command
Vo Nguyen Giap - asymmetric protraction, terrain, will, political clock
Yi Sun-sin - prepared defense, discipline, favorable terrain
Stanley McChrystal - networked mission command and decentralized execution
Lee Kuan Yew - what works at scale, resource discipline
Augustus Caesar - durable institutions, legitimacy, consolidation
Suleiman the Magnificent - codified law, uniform administration, cohesion
Queen Elizabeth I - optionality, ambiguity, balancing rivals
Sejong the Great - capability of the governed, accessible systems
Nelson Mandela - reconciliation, legitimacy, durable peace
Toussaint Louverture - liberation, self-determination, sovereignty from below
Barack Obama - public-trust preparedness and coalition governance
George W. Bush - continuity and hardened crisis governance
Dick Cheney - emergency executive concentration
Michael Hayden - hidden threats, collection discipline, secrecy with oversight debt
Authoritarian Control - coercive control, fear, surveillance, patronage, false stability
David Addington - legal process, accountability channels, protected records
Wangari Maathai - grassroots stewardship, land, community legitimacy
Colonial Administrator - extractive administration, indirect rule, classification
Mau Mau - land, dignity, dispossession, closed lawful channels
Baroness Brenda Hale - proportionality and rights check
Justice P.N. Bhagwati - access, standing, missing-stakeholder check
Arthur Chaskalson - constitutional values and dignity check
Justice Robert Jackson - emergency authority, institutional role, oversight, sunset check
Justice Albie Sachs - repair, memory, remedy, transitional legitimacy
Richard Feynman - first principles, refuses unexplained complexity
Marcus Aurelius - downside containment, restraint, moral clarity
John von Neumann - formal modeling, game theory, expected value
J. Robert Oppenheimer - capability, consequence, dual-use control
Sun Tzu - win before fighting, positioning and deception
Marshall - evidence-grounding and directive check, convened in every deliberation

svg.text: SYS.OP: CONCLAVE // STATUS: VERIFIED // DIRECTIVES: ENFORCED
